mapper.sql: select i.id, i.task_id, t.task_no, t.task_name, i.workpiece_name, i.customer_dept_id, d.dept_name as customer_dept_name, i.study_instance_uid, i.series_instance_uid, i.sop_instance_uid, i.orthanc_study_id, i.orthanc_series_id, i.orthanc_instance_id, i.modality, i.series_number, i.instance_number, i.series_description, i.sop_class_uid, i.is_original, i.file_name, i.file_size, i.upload_user_id, i.upload_time, i.integrity_status, i.remark, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.del_flag from ndt_dicom_instance i left join ndt_inspection_task t on t.id = i.task_id left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = i.customer_dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into ndt_dicom_instance (task_id, workpiece_name, customer_dept_id, study_instance_uid, series_instance_uid, sop_instance_uid, orthanc_study_id, orthanc_series_id, orthanc_instance_id, modality, series_number, instance_number, series_description, sop_class_uid, is_original, file_name, file_size, upload_user_id, upload_time, integrity_status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{taskId}, #{workpieceName}, #{customerDeptId}, #{studyInstanceUid}, #{seriesInstanceUid}, #{sopInstanceUid}, #{orthancStudyId}, #{orthancSeriesId}, #{orthancInstanceId}, #{modality}, #{seriesNumber}, #{instanceNumber}, #{seriesDescription}, #{sopClassUid}, #{isOriginal}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadTime}, #{integrityStatus}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update ndt_dicom_instance set task_id = #{taskId}, workpiece_name = #{workpieceName}, customer_dept_id = #{customerDeptId}, study_instance_uid = #{studyInstanceUid}, series_instance_uid = #{seriesInstanceUid}, orthanc_study_id = #{orthancStudyId}, orthanc_series_id = #{orthancSeriesId}, orthanc_instance_id = #{orthancInstanceId}, modality = #{modality}, series_number = #{seriesNumber}, instance_number = #{instanceNumber}, series_description = #{seriesDescription}, sop_class_uid = #{sopClassUid}, is_original = #{isOriginal}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_size = #{fileSize}, upload_user_id = #{uploadUserId}, upload_time = #{uploadTime}, integrity_status = #{integrityStatus}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), del_flag = #{delFlag} where id = #{id}
